Items.name: Assault Rifle
Items.description: An Assault Rifle that mows down enemies with overwhelming force. It excels at rapid-fire and is well suited to taking down powerful foes.

Items.name: Stone Axe
Items.description: An axe for cutting wood. Made from stone, it's not very sharp.

Items.name: Metal Axe
Items.description: An axe for cutting wood. Made from metal, it chops through Hardwood with ease, making it useful for harvesting sturdy trees that grow deep within the continent. Logging Yield Up Lv. 1

Items.name: Refined Metal Axe
Items.description: An axe for cutting wood. Made from high quality metal, its sharpness and durability has improved even further. It can harvest Hardwood from sturdy trees that grow in unforgiving lands. Logging Yield Up Lv. 2

Items.name: Metal Detector
Items.description: Using this reveals hidden Chromite deposits in dungeons, marking them for easier mining. Deposits will become unmarked if you move too far away.

Items.name: Wooden Club
Items.description: A Wooden Club for close range combat. Can beat a small Pal to a pulp if need be.

Items.name: Bat
Items.description: Baseball bat for close-range combat. Might be tough to get a home run with a Pal.

Items.name: Meat Cleaver
Items.description: Knife for butchering Pals. When equipped, the Pet command becomes Butcher. Butchered Pals will be gone for good.

Items.name: Stun Baton
Items.description: Close range weapon that sends out an electric jolt upon contact. Pals are easier to capture when electrocuted.

Items.name: Crossbow
Items.description: Fires an Arrow effortlessly. Though it takes time to load, it delivers a powerful shot.

Items.name: Double-Barreled Shotgun
Items.description: Wreaks havoc at close range. Can fire twice before reloading. Despite the limited load capacity, it still packs a punch.

Items.name: Handgun
Items.description: A handgun with improved capacity and rapid-fire capabilities. Has more immediate firepower than a Makeshift Handgun .

Items.name: Decal Gun 1
Items.description: Strange gun that paints a picture of Cattiva where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

Items.name: Decal Gun 2
Items.description: Strange gun that paints a picture of Lamball where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

Items.name: Decal Gun 3
Items.description: Strange gun that paints a picture of Melpaca where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

Items.name: Decal Gun 4
Items.description: Strange gun that paints a picture of Anubis where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

Items.name: Decal Gun 5
Items.description: Strange gun that paints a picture of Relaxaurus where it is fired. Have some fun and paint the walls or ceilings!

Items.name: Homing Sphere Launcher
Items.description: A launcher for firing spheres. Fired spheres home in on Pals.

Items.name: Laser Rifle
Items.description: A weapon that fires high-energy lasers. It has impressive firepower and is easy to handle.

Items.name: Rocket Launcher
Items.description: A Rocket Launcher that can fire a powerful round from long distances.

Items.name: Stone Pickaxe
Items.description: A pickaxe used for mining. Made from stone, the efficiency is questionable.

Items.name: Metal Pickaxe
Items.description: A pickaxe used for mining. Made from metal, its durability and efficiency have improved. Mining Yield Up Lv. 1

Items.name: Refined Metal Pickaxe
Items.description: A pickaxe used for mining. Its durability and efficiency have further improved. Mining Yield Up Lv. 2

Items.name: Pump-Action Shotgun
Items.description: A high capacity, powerful shotgun. It has outstanding close range DPS.

Items.name: Single-Shot Rifle
Items.description: A single-shot rifle. Takes time to load. What it lacks in capacity, it makes up for with sheer power.

Items.name: Scatter Sphere Launcher
Items.description: A new type of launcher that fires a large number of spheres. It can easily capture a herd of Pals.

Items.name: Single-Shot Sphere Launcher
Items.description: A launcher that fires spheres. It can capture Pals from a greater distance.

Items.name: Sword
Items.description: Sword for close-range combat. The blade is extremely sharp! Mightier than a pen, for sure. Requires Weapon Workbench to craft.

Items.name: Frag Grenade
Items.description: A Frag Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, dealing damage to enemies.

Items.name: Incendiary Grenade
Items.description: A Incendiary Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, setting the surrounding area on fire.

Items.name: Shock Grenade
Items.description: A Shock Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, electrocuting everything in the blast radius.

Items.name: Ice Grenade
Items.description: A Ice Grenade useful for mid-range combat. It detonates a few seconds after being thrown, freezing the surrounding area.

Items.name: Old Bow
Items.description: Primitive long range weapon. Hastily put together, it isn't very powerful.

Items.name: Poison Bow
Items.description: Frightening bow that poisons its target. Poisoned Pals are easier to capture. Requires Poison Arrow .

Items.name: Fire Bow
Items.description: A bow that deals Fire damage. Burns Pals with fire arrows, making them easier to capture. Requires Fire Arrow .

Items.name: Poison Arrow Crossbow
Items.description: A Crossbow that inflicts poison on its target. Poisoned Pals are easier to capture. Requires Poison Arrow .

Items.name: Fire Arrow Crossbow
Items.description: A Crossbow that deals Fire damage. Burns Pals with fire arrows, making them easier to capture. Requires Fire Arrow .

Items.name: Three Shot Bow
Items.description: An enhanced bow that allows three arrows to be fired simultaneously. By some strange mechanism, it only consumes a single Arrow when fired.

Items.name: Hand-Held Torch
Items.description: Lights up dark areas and keeps you warm. Can also be used for close range combat in a pinch.

Items.name: Makeshift Handgun
Items.description: A handgun created from spare parts. Relatively well suited for close-quarters combat, but fires only one shot at a time.

Items.name: Stone Spear
Items.description: Useful for close-range combat. Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

Items.name: Metal Spear
Items.description: Useful for close-range combat. The metal tip give it an increased attack power. Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

Items.name: Refined Metal Spear
Items.description: Useful for close-range combat. The high-quality metal tip give it an increased attack power. Its length allows you to stand further away when attacking.

Items.name: Elizabee's Staff
Items.description: A spear made from Elizabee 's staff, altered for human use. It is imbued with Elizabee 's indomitable spirit.

Items.name: Beegarde's Spear
Items.description: A spear made from the Beegarde 's spear, altered for human use. Can feel a sincere loyalty.

Items.name: Lily's Spear
Items.description: The spear cherished by Lily. Punishes those who neglect their Pals.

Items.name: Grappling Gun
Items.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. It allows for easy movement between places with varying elevation.

Items.name: Mega Grappling Gun
Items.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. Since it's upgraded, it now has greater range.

Items.name: Giga Grappling Gun
Items.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. Using data from prototype versions, its capabilities have been further increased.

Items.name: Hyper Grappling Gun
Items.description: It fires a hook that latches on to distant targets, pulling the user's body towards the target. As a result of research, it has achieved overwhelming mobility.

Items.description: Simple, old fashioned gun. Fires a single, powerful shot at the expense of a long reload time.

Items.name: Pal Sphere
Items.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. This basic model is only effective on low level Pals.

Items.name: Mega Sphere
Items.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Its capabilities have been improved, allowing it to catch a wider range of Pals.

Items.name: Giga Sphere
Items.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Able to capture moderately powerful Pals.

Items.name: Hyper Sphere
Items.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Enhanced capabilities allow it to capture even more powerful Pals.

Items.name: Ultra Sphere
Items.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Not many Pals can escape its highly efficient design.

Items.name: Legendary Sphere
Items.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Very few Pals can escape its perfected design.

Items.name: Ultimate Sphere
Items.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Almost no Pals can escape its flawless design.

Items.name: Exotic Sphere
Items.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. Boasting incredible performance, it can capture Pals that fall outside regular standards.

Items.name: Sol Sphere
Items.description: An item that captures Pals when thrown. A high-grade Sphere from an ancient civilization that secured coexistence with Pals.

Items.name: Ancient Sphere
Items.description: A tool that captures Pals when thrown. An ultimate Sphere created as the pinnacle of an ancient civilization, imbued with the power of the World Tree.

Items.name: Radar Sphere
Items.description: A sphere that captures Pals when thrown. Though it has a low chance of success, it can forcibly capture another person’s Pal.

Items.name: Heavy Weight Module
Items.description: Equipping it makes the sphere heavier, reducing its range but increasing its capture power. Sphere Weight +1 Capture Strength +1

Items.name: Curve Module
Items.description: Equipping it causes the sphere to spin with a curved trajectory. It becomes easier to catch Pals off guard, and increases capture power. Sphere Curve +1 Capture Strength +2

Items.name: Sniper Module
Items.description: Equipping it increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power. Sphere Range +1 Capture Strength +2

Items.name: Slider Module
Items.description: Equipping it adds a slider spin to the sphere. The sphere curves at a sharp angle, making it easier to catch Pals off guard and increasing capture power. Sphere Slider Capture Strength +3

Items.name: Sniper Module II
Items.description: Equipping it significantly increases the sphere's range, allowing it to sharply capture Pals and enhancing capture power. Sphere Range +2 Capture Strength +3

Items.name: Homing Module
Items.description: Equipping it makes the sphere home in on Pals, further increasing capture power. Sphere Homing Capture Strength +3

Items.name: Gold Coin
Items.description: Currency traded on Palpagos Island. Can be exchanged for items or Pals with merchants.

Items.name: Charcoal
Items.description: Charcoal made from burning Wood . It can be combined with Sulfur to create Gunpowder .

Items.name: Cloth
Items.description: Cloth woven from Wool . Required to create armor. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench .

Items.name: High Quality Cloth
Items.description: High Quality Cloth woven from a large amount of Wool . Required to create high quality armor. Can be crafted at High Quality Workbench .

Items.name: Coal
Items.description: Coal often found in caves and other places. Required to create high quality metal.

Items.name: Ingot
Items.description: A material required to create metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore using a furnace.

Items.name: Ore
Items.description: Becomes an ingot when refined using a furnace. Can be found in caves and other places.

Items.name: Fiber
Items.description: Fiber collected from trees. A material used when creating bows, etc.

Items.name: Gunpowder
Items.description: Gunpowder used to fire ammunition. Required to make bullets.

Items.name: Beautiful Flower
Items.description: A plant that blooms colorful flowers. Can be used to make Suspicious Juice and Strange Juice .

Items.name: Refined Ingot
Items.description: A material required to create high quality metal weapons and armor. Refined from Ore and Coal using a furnace.

Items.name: Leather
Items.description: Leather taken from a Pal, it serves as a defensive material. It can be obtained from certain Pals.

Items.name: Wooden Board
Items.description: Planks made from processed wood for easier use. More versatile than raw logs, with a wide variety of uses. Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench .

Items.name: High Quality Wooden Board
Items.description: Fine planks carefully carved from Hardwood . They have beautiful wood grain and are used for structures with a luxurious feel. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II .

Items.name: Nail
Items.description: Necessary for building various facilities. Can be made with a Primitive Workbench .

Items.name: Circuit Board
Items.description: Required to create precision equipment. Can be made with a Production Assembly Line .

Items.name: Pal Metal Ingot
Items.description: A material required to create Pal Metal weapons and armor. Strengthened by creating an alloy incorporating Paldium.

Items.name: Stone
Items.description: Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by mining rocks.

Items.name: Berry Seeds
Items.description: Seeds that produce Red Berries . Necessary for starting a farm. Can be obtained when picking Red Berries .

Items.name: Tomato Seeds
Items.description: Seeds that produce Tomato . Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

Items.name: Wheat Seeds
Items.description: Seeds that produce Wheat . Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

Items.name: Wood
Items.description: Material for structures and items. Can be obtained by cutting trees.

Items.name: Hardwood
Items.description: High-quality wood carefully selected from sturdy trees grown in harsh environments such as deserts, volcanic regions, and snowy mountains.

Items.name: Mythical Wood
Items.description: Rare wood imbued with the power of the World Tree. Only skilled craftsmen are able to process it.

Items.name: Wool
Items.description: Material sheared from sheep Pals. A necessity for creating bedding, Cloth and more.

Items.name: Crude Oil
Items.description: A material that can be processed into various products. Obtained by installing a Crude Oil Extractor in an oil field.

Items.name: Plasteel
Items.description: Plasteel created by processing Crude Oil and metal. Can be produced in a Electric Furnace .

Items.name: Computer
Items.description: A component used in the control of automated equipment and precision machinery. It's a key component forming the foundation of modern technology. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II .

Items.name: AI Core
Items.description: A core component essential to cutting-edge devices, enabling complex decision-making and autonomous control. Can be crafted at Advanced Workshop .

Items.name: Cryogenic Coolant
Items.description: A high-efficiency cooling medium made from special components derived from Pals. Used to regulate temperature in high-output devices. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line .

Items.name: Bio Battery
Items.description: A device that stores bio-energy as electrical power. Used for equipment requiring high energy density. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II .

Items.name: Thermal Core
Items.description: A high-temperature reaction core containing vast thermal energy. Used as a power component in advanced devices. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line II .

Items.name: Corrosive Solvent
Items.description: A dangerous chemical solvent with strong decomposing properties. Used for precision processing and special treatments. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line .

Items.name: Ruby
Items.description: A gemstone that glows red. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Items.name: Sapphire
Items.description: A gemstone that glows blue. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Items.name: Emerald
Items.description: A gemstone that glows green. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Items.name: Diamond
Items.description: A rare gemstone that glows brilliantly. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Items.name: Dark Egg
Items.description: A Dark Egg . Something chaotic stirs within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

Items.name: Dark Egg
Items.description: A Dark Egg . Something chaotic stirs within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

Items.description: A Large Dark Egg . A vicious wail howls within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

Items.name: Huge Dark Egg
Items.description: A Huge Dark Egg . A shadowy spirit cries within—as if a monster is about to be born. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

Items.description: A Dragon Egg . Something mischievous stirs within. Place in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

Items.name: Ancient Civilization Parts
Items.description: Debris excavated from ancient ruins. Contains abundant information on lost technology. Extremely valuable, people from all walks of life are now seeking such crystals.

Items.name: Small Pal Soul
Items.description: A spirit left behind by a small Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power .

Items.name: Medium Pal Soul
Items.description: A spirit left behind by a Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power .

Items.name: Large Pal Soul
Items.description: A spirit left behind by a large Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power .

Items.name: Sulfur
Items.description: Sulfur that can be found in volcanoes and such. Necessary for making Gunpowder .

Items.name: Pure Quartz
Items.description: Pure Quartz often found in snowy fields and similar places. Required to create Circuit Board .

Items.name: High Quality Pal Oil
Items.description: High-quality oil that can be extracted from Pal. Necessary for making Polymer .

Items.name: Polymer
Items.description: Polymer made from refined oil. Required for producing various advanced items such as firearms. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line .

Items.name: Electric Organ
Items.description: Material obtainable from Electric Pals. It stores electricity, but requires caution when used.

Items.name: Venom Gland
Items.description: Material obtainable from poisonous Pals. Can be used to make Poison Arrow and more.

Items.name: Flame Organ
Items.description: Material obtainable from Fire Pals. Can be used to make Fire Arrow and more.

Items.name: Ice Organ
Items.description: Material obtainable from Ice Pals. Can be used to make Ice Mine and more.

Items.name: Bone
Items.description: Bone collected from Pals. A valuable source of premium calcium.

Items.name: Cement
Items.description: Cement used for creating structures and more. Can be produced in a High Quality Workbench .

Items.name: Carbon Fiber
Items.description: A lightweight yet sturdy material. Used to create armor and other equipment. Can be crafted at Production Assembly Line .

Items.name: Horn
Items.description: Horn collected from Pals. Used to create medicines and more.

Items.name: Aquatic Pal Fluids
Items.description: Bodily fluids taken from a Water Pal. Their high viscosity makes them a handy material.

Items.name: Tocotoco Feather
Items.description: Feathers dropped from a Tocotoco . Used to make clothing, as the beautifully vivid colors are quite popular.

Items.name: Gumoss Leaf
Items.description: Leaf dropped from a Gumoss . Fresh and sticky, it is used to make clothing.

Items.name: Penking Plume
Items.description: Plume dropped from a Penking . Bright and colorful, it is used to make clothing.

Items.name: Katress Hair
Items.description: Hair dropped from a Katress . Soft and supple, it is used to make clothing.

Items.name: Precious Dragon Stone
Items.description: A gemstone-like ball collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Items.name: Precious Plume
Items.description: Glittering feathers collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Items.name: Precious Entrails
Items.description: A heart that never stops beating collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Items.name: Precious Claw
Items.description: Extremely sharp claws collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Items.name: Precious Pelt
Items.description: Fluffy fur collected from Pals. Can be sold to a merchant for a high price.

Items.name: Ancient Civilization Core
Items.description: Core from technology that was lost long ago. Nearly impossible to find on the Palpagos Islands, it contains a wealth of forgotten knowledge.

Items.name: Life Lotus (S)
Items.description: Small green flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Vital Remedy.

Items.name: Stamina Lotus (S)
Items.description: Small yellow flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Stamina Remedy.

Items.name: Power Lotus (S)
Items.description: Small red flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Might Remedy.

Items.name: Speed Lotus (S)
Items.description: Small orange flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Speed Remedy.

Items.name: Carrying Lotus (S)
Items.description: Small purple flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Burden Remedy.

Items.name: Ribbuny Ribbon
Items.description: Ribbon dropped from a Ribbuny . Cute in color and design, it is used to make clothing.

Items.name: Swee Hair
Items.description: Hair dropped from a Swee . Fluffy and soft, it is used to make clothing.

Items.name: Killamari Tentacle
Items.description: Tentacle dropped from a Killamari . Strange in texture, it is used to make clothing.

Items.name: Dazzi Cloud
Items.description: Cloud dropped from a Dazzi . Soft and fluffy, it is used to make clothing.

Items.name: Leezpunk Crest
Items.description: Crest dropped from a Leezpunk . Sharp and pointy, it is used to make clothing.

Items.name: Life Lotus (L)
Items.description: Large green flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Vital Elixir.

Items.name: Stamina Lotus (L)
Items.description: Large yellow flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Stamina Elixir.

Items.name: Power Lotus (L)
Items.description: Large red flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Might Elixir.

Items.name: Speed Lotus (L)
Items.description: Large orange flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Speed Elixir.

Items.name: Carrying Lotus (L)
Items.description: Large purple flower that is extremely difficult to obtain. Needed to make Burden Elixir.

Items.name: Meteorite Fragment
Items.description: Fragment of a rock from outer space. Contains large amounts of Paldium Fragment , which can be extracted by placing it in a Crusher .

Items.name: Dog Coin
Items.description: A mysterious coin. Apparently there are people who collect these. A Mimog will usually have them, but for some reason, they cannot be obtained by butchering it.

Items.name: Giant Pal Soul
Items.description: The soul left behind by a highly trained Pal. It can draw out hidden abilities if offered to a Statue of Power .

Items.name: Potato Seeds
Items.description: Seeds that produce Potato . Necessary for starting a farm.

Items.name: Carrot Seeds
Items.description: Seeds that produce Carrot . Necessary for starting a farm.

Items.name: Onion Seeds
Items.description: Seeds that produce Onion . Necessary for starting a farm.

Items.name: Predator Core
Items.description: Core dropped by Predator Pals. It is filled with mysterious energy.

Items.name: Successful Bounty Token
Items.description: A token of having defeated a bounty target. By giving it to a Vigilante Bounty Officer in villages or towns, it can be exchanged for a reward.

Items.name: Ancient Pal Manuscript
Items.description: An ancient manuscript written on Pal hide. It may be found by Pals during expeditions. Required for advancing research.

Items.name: Chromite
Items.description: A type of metal buried underground. It can be detected with a Metal Detector on certain islands.

Items.name: Hexolite
Items.description: An alloy of Chromite and Hexolite Quartz . Used for building advanced equipment and structures. Can be refined at Gigantic Furnace .

Items.name: Nightstar Sand
Items.description: Sand that can be found in the desert at night. Used as a material for crafting certain accessories and other items.

Items.name: Dark Fragment
Items.description: Dropped by some powerful Dark Pals. Used as a material for crafting powerful accessories and other items.

Items.name: Hexolite Quartz
Items.description: A rare crystal found only in Feybreak. Over many years, Paladium has condensed and transformed, now shining with a rainbow-like glow.

Items.name: Battle Ticket
Items.description: Earned by winning solo matches in the arena. Collect enough and you can trade them for special rewards.

Items.name: Hallowed Bar
Items.description: [Tides of Terraria] A sacred material infused with divine energy. Can be used to create a variety of Terraria items.

Items.name: Coralum Ore
Items.description: A rare ore formed over countless years in the deep sea. Can be retrieved from the depths with a magnet and fishing rod.

Items.name: Coralum Ingot
Items.description: An alloy made from Coralum Ore found on the ocean floor. Highly resistant to energy, making it ideal for crafting weapons. Can be refined at Gigantic Furnace .

Items.name: Paldium Fragment
Items.description: Crystallized energy from the World Tree. Capable of creating supernatural items and structures.

Items.name: Lettuce Seeds
Items.description: Seeds that produce Lettuce . Necessary for starting a farm. Can be purchased from a merchant.

Items.name: Ominous Egg
Items.description: An Ominous Egg . A mysterious egg imbued with the energy of the World Tree. Place it in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

Items.name: Ominous Egg
Items.description: An Ominous Egg . A mysterious egg imbued with the energy of the World Tree. Place it in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

Items.name: Large Ominous Egg
Items.description: An Large Ominous Egg . A mysterious egg imbued with the energy of the World Tree. Place it in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

Items.name: Large Ominous Egg
Items.description: An Large Ominous Egg . A mysterious egg imbued with the energy of the World Tree. Place it in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

Items.name: Huge Ominous Egg
Items.description: An Huge Ominous Egg . A mysterious egg imbued with the energy of the World Tree. Place it in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

Items.name: Water Radiant Gem
Items.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Water Pals.

Items.name: Electric Radiant Gem
Items.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Electric Pals.

Items.name: Ground Radiant Gem
Items.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Ground Pals.

Items.name: Grass Radiant Gem
Items.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Grass Pals.

Items.name: Fire Radiant Gem
Items.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Fire Pals.

Items.name: Ice Radiant Gem
Items.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Ice Pals.

Items.name: Dragon Radiant Gem
Items.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Dragon Pals.

Items.name: Dark Radiant Gem
Items.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Dark Pals.

Items.name: Neutral Radiant Gem
Items.description: A gem formed as World Tree energy accumulates within a Pal’s body. When processed, it becomes an item that releases the hidden power of Neutral Pals.

Items.name: Soralite
Items.description: A rare ore produced only in Sunreach. Within its host rock of overwhelming density resides a mysterious pattern and radiance.

Items.name: Paloxite
Items.description: Energy leaking from the World Tree that has crystallized after many years. Those without protection who touch it will instantly rust and decay. Only those who can master its delicacy can reach the pinnacle of ancient technology.

Items.name: Decayed Ancient Relic
Items.description: Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization. Completely decayed, with no energy remaining.

Items.name: Dormant Ancient Relic
Items.description: Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization. In decent condition, but almost no energy remains.

Items.name: Gorgeous Ancient Relic
Items.description: Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization. In good condition, and you can feel the energy flowing.

Items.name: Glowing Ancient Relic
Items.description: Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization. In very good condition, light is leaking from within.

Items.name: Glistening Ancient Relic
Items.description: Fragments of structures and tools from an ancient civilization. In very good condition, light is leaking from within. It is overflowing with energy and emitting a glow.

Items.name: Soralite Ingot
Items.description: An ancient metal refined from ore that slumbers in Sunreach. A rare processed material, forming the foundation of high-grade equipment and structures. Can be refined at Ancient Furnace .

Items.name: Paloxite Ingot
Items.description: An indomitable alloy created by fusing Soralite and Paloxite . A highly rare material, crystallizing the technology of ancient civilization and the power of the World Tree. It is vital for crafting the highest-grade equipment and structures.

Items.name: Huge Mutated Egg
Items.description: [WIP] Description not finalized. A Huge Mutated Egg . You can feel the restless aura of a strange soul, as if a monster is about to be born. Place it in a Egg Incubator to hatch it.

Items.name: Toxin Filtering Membrane
Items.description: An organ that protects Dandilord from the corrosive mist it emits. It filters and neutralizes the corrosive mist.

Items.name: Explosion-Resistant Fiber
Items.description: Fibers taken from the surface of a Silvance ’s body. It can reduce the impact of explosions.

Items.name: Ancient Bark
Items.description: The bark of a tree that has lived for many years in extreme environments. Even the thin bark evokes a sense of boundless vitality.

Items.name: Ancient Lava
Items.description: A mass of lava formed over long years in extreme environments. The sealed-in blue lava is still emitting heat.

Items.name: Ancient Bone
Items.description: A beast bone weathered over many years in extreme environments. Even after losing its flesh, it still gives off a strong presence.

Items.name: Mutated Egg
Items.description: A Mutated Egg . An egg that is extremely rarely obtained, having undergone a special mutation. Place it in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

Items.name: Mutated Egg
Items.description: A Mutated Egg . An egg that is extremely rarely obtained, having undergone a special mutation. Place it in a Egg Incubator to incubate it.

Items.name: Dung
Items.description: Animal dung. An essential part of any ecosystem, and can even be used as fertilizer. It smells awful, to say the least.

Items.name: Huge Dung
Items.description: It has an intimidating presence. Whether it's the scent or the shape, this is the mark of a heavyweight.

Items.description: Pulverized remnants of some kind of biological tissue. Leftover residue from butchering a genetically reconstructed Pal, it serves no purpose and can only be sold or discarded.

Items.name: Luminite Bar
Items.description: [Tides of Terraria] A material exuding immense power, dropped by Moon Lord . Radiates a soft, moon-like glow.

Items.name: PAL_Growth_Stone_L
Items.description: A mysterious stone that can strengthen the pal. By offering it to the statue of the goddess, it brings out her hidden talents.

Items.name: Champion's Emblem
Items.description: An emblem of glory earned through victory. Bearing it signifies superiority on the battlefield.

Items.name: PAL_Growth_Stone_M
Items.description: A mysterious stone that can strengthen the pal. By offering it to the statue of the goddess, it brings out her hidden talents.

Items.name: Low Grade Medical Supplies
Items.description: Low Grade Medical Supplies good for Sick, Sprain, and Overfull. They don't heal Health when eaten, however.

Items.name: Medical Supplies
Items.description: Strange Medical Supplies that are effective at treating Ulcer and Fracture. Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.

Items.name: High Grade Medical Supplies
Items.description: High Grade Medical Supplies that are effective at treating Weakened and Depressed. Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.

Items.name: Mind Control Meds
Items.description: Mind Control Meds that are extremely effective in controlling dissidents. Unfortunately, they have no healing effect.

Items.name: Suspicious Juice
Items.description: Juice that improves mood when consumed. Drinking it increases work speed for a period of time, but lowers SAN.

Items.name: Strange Juice
Items.description: Juice that greatly improves mood when consumed. Drinking it significantly increases work speed for a period of time, but significantly lowers SAN.

Items.name: Memory Wiping Medicine
Items.description: A potion that allows the player to reset their status points when consumed. It has no effect if consumed by a Pal.

Items.name: Advanced Technical Manual
Items.description: A book that contains secrets of amazing technology. Use it to obtain a few Technology Points.

Items.name: Innovative Technical Manual
Items.description: A book that contains secrets of cutting-edge technology. Use it to obtain Technology Points.

Items.name: Futuristic Technical Manual
Items.description: A book that contains secrets of technology beyond current day comprehension. Use it to obtain lots of Technology Points.

Items.name: Ancient Technical Manual
Items.description: A book that contains long-lost secrets of technology from a forgotten era. Use it to obtain Ancient Technology Points.

Items.name: Low Quality Recovery Meds
Items.description: Medicine that heals wounds over time. Low quality, but restores some Health.

Items.name: Recovery Meds
Items.description: Medicine that heals wounds over time. Restores a decent amount of Health.

Items.name: High Quality Recovery Meds
Items.description: Medicine that heals wounds over time. High quality; restores a lot of Health.

Items.name: Vital Remedy
Items.description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Health by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Items.name: Stamina Remedy
Items.description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Stamina by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Items.name: Might Remedy
Items.description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Attack by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Items.name: Speed Remedy
Items.description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises Work Speed by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Items.name: Burden Remedy
Items.description: Extremely valuable potion that permanently raises carrying capacity by a slight amount when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Items.name: Vital Elixir
Items.description: Extremely valuable elixir that permanently raises Health when consumed. Ineffective when used by Pals.

Items.name: Burden Elixir

Items.name: Training Manual (S)

Items.name: Training Manual (M)
Items.description: Training manual that grants a small amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

Items.name: Training Manual (L)
Items.description: Training manual that grants a large amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

Items.name: Training Manual (XL)
Items.description: Training manual that grants a substantial amount of EXP when read by a Pal.

Items.name: Training Crystal
Items.description: Strange crystal that when given to a Pal raises its level by one.

Items.name: Life Fruit
Items.description: Precious fruit that is extremely difficult to obtain. Slightly increases a Pal's Health.

Items.name: Power Fruit
Items.description: Precious fruit that is extremely difficult to obtain. Slightly increases a Pal's Attack.

Items.name: Red Berries
Items.description: A versatile ingredient that is delicious raw or cooked. They can be found anywhere on the island.

Items.name: Baked Berries
Items.description: Cooking enhances their nutritional value, and surprisingly, they are quite filling.

Items.name: Bread
Items.description: Bread made from baked Flour . A tasty staple food.

Items.name: Tomato
Items.description: A fresh ingredient that brightens any dish. Filled with lycopene, they’re also very healthy.

Items.name: Wheat
Items.description: An ingredient that forms the base of various dishes. Wheat is a common crop in many parts of the world.

Items.name: Flour
Items.description: Flour made from grinding Wheat . It can be used as an ingredient in making Bread .

Items.name: Lettuce
Items.description: A leafy green. When it comes to salad, this is a must. It has an exquisitely crunchy texture and refreshing taste.

Items.name: Egg
Items.description: Delicious when fried, but can also be used to cook various meals. Chikipi produce them.

Items.name: Milk
Items.description: Drink it as is, or use it in various meals. Can be milked from Mozzarina .

Items.name: Hot Milk
Items.description: Even more delicious when warmed up. Great for keeping hunger away.

Items.name: Jam-Filled Bun
Items.description: Bread with jam spread on it. The sweetness of the berries complements it perfectly.

Items.name: Salad
Items.description: A Salad made by mixing Lettuce and Tomato . Eating it slightly improves work speed for a period of time.

Items.name: Omelet
Items.description: A dish made by frying an Egg and topping it with ketchup. Eating it improves Attack by +10% for a period of time.

Items.name: Pancake
Items.description: A dish made by mixing Flour and Milk together then baking. Eating it progressively decreases the rate at which one's sanity decreases for a period of time.

Items.name: Marinated Mushrooms
Items.description: A dish made by marinating Mushroom s in a marinade. Eating it improves Defense by +10% for a period of time.

Items.name: Mushroom Soup
Items.description: Cream soup made of Mushroom s. Eating it allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

Items.name: Carbonara
Items.description: A dish mixing pasta with Egg and Milk . Eating it makes it improves Defense by +20% for a period of time.

Items.name: Pizza
Items.description: A dish made by piling Red Berries , Tomato and cheese on Bread . Eating it slightly improves work speed and allows you to stay fuller for slightly longer for a period of time.

Items.name: Cake
Items.description: A dish eaten during celebrations. Put it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg.

Items.name: Fried Egg
Items.description: An Egg now fried and even more delicious. Great for keeping hunger away.

Items.name: Mushroom
Items.description: A mushroom that can be eaten raw. They can be found anywhere on the island.

Items.name: Baked Mushroom
Items.description: Cooking this mushroom enhances its nutritional value. Curiously, it's also quite filling.

Items.name: Honey
Items.description: Honey harvested from Beegarde . It's sweet and tasty.

Items.name: Cotton Candy
Items.description: Cotton candy collected from Woolipop . Its sweetness fluffily melts away in your mouth.

Items.name: Chikipi Poultry
Items.description: Chikipi meat. Light and easy to eat, it's a local favorite for residents of Palpagos Island.

Items.name: Lamball Mutton
Items.description: Lamball meat. Red meat with a unique flavor. Delicious, but takes some getting used to.

Items.name: Raw Kelpsea
Items.description: Kelpsea meat. Tender and slightly sweet. Fish meat tends to spoil quickly.

Items.name: Galeclaw Poultry
Items.description: Galeclaw meat. Full of nutrition, its flavor packs a punch.

Items.name: Rushoar Pork
Items.description: Rushoar meat. Full of the delicious flavors of wild game. Juicy and nutritious.

Items.name: Raw Dumud
Items.description: Dumud meat. Fatty with a rich taste. Has a mouthwatering plump texture.

Items.name: Eikthyrdeer Venison
Items.description: Eikthyrdeer meat. Light and lean, but rich in flavor.

Items.name: Reindrix Venison
Items.description: Reindrix meat. Strange venison capable of remaining at low temperatures. Takes a very long time to spoil.

Items.name: Caprity Meat
Items.description: Caprity meat. Healthy and full of nutrients. Hints of berries scenting the meat stimulates the appetite.

Items.name: Mozzarina Meat
Items.description: Mozzarina meat. Thick, juicy and marbled. Residents of Palpagos Island cherish it above all other meats.

Items.name: Broncherry Meat
Items.description: Broncherry meat. Giant meat full of massive stores of energy. Stuffed to the brim with nutrients gathered through photosynthesis.

Items.name: Mammorest Meat
Items.description: Mammorest meat. With massive size comes massive flavor. Its overwhelming portions are sure to satisfy any glutton.

Items.name: Grilled Chikipi
Items.description: Chicken skewer slow-grilled over a charcoal fire. Light and refreshing on the tongue.

Items.name: Lamball Kebab
Items.description: Spiced and roasted mutton. Deeply complex with unique flavors.

Items.name: Grilled Kelpsea
Items.description: Fresh fish grilled over a charcoal fire. Plump and juicy.

Items.name: Grilled Galeclaw
Items.description: Grilled meat full of vitality for flying high in the skies.

Items.name: Roast Rushoar
Items.description: Boar grilled over a hearty flame. Crispy on the outside, juicy on the inside. Perfect as an extravagant main dish for a big party.

Items.name: Broiled Dumud
Items.description: Grilled fish slathered with a secret sauce. Soothes both mind and body. Perfect for tired Pal Tamers.

Items.name: Roast Eikthyrdeer
Items.description: Carefully roasted venison with delicate flavor notes, accented by the aromas of the deep forest. Elegant taste for an elegant lifestyle.

Items.name: Roast Reindrix
Items.description: When taken from a flame, Reindrix meat rapidly drops in temperature. This allows it to retain freshness for long periods of time, making it a perfect emergency ration.

Items.name: Herb Roasted Caprity
Items.description: Mild roast filled with the natural aromas of herbs and berries embedded in the meat. Gives a pleasant sense of warmth when eaten outdoors.

Items.name: Mozzarina Steak
Items.description: Thick, well-done steak. Strong flavors give those who eat it an energy boost.

Items.name: Broncherry Rib Roast
Items.description: Grilled meat brimming with the flavor of the king of the wilds. Juices from the compressed meat flow from the bone, making it surprisingly tender despite the initial toughness.

Items.name: Mammorest Steak
Items.description: Boasts a rich and dignified flavor. Memories of glaciers and deep forests come rushing back with every bite.

Items.name: Chikipi Sauté
Items.description: Plump poultry sautéed in butter. Accented with fresh lemons. Eating it will slightly increase work speed for a period of time.

Items.name: Herb Roasted Lamball
Items.description: Indulging in an abundance of fresh berries creates a tantalizing aroma that accentuates the unique flavor of mutton. Eating it will increase Defense by +10% for a period of time.

Items.name: Grilled Lamball
Items.description: Marinated mutton slow-cooked over a grill. Eating it will slightly increase work speed and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

Items.name: Stewed Galeclaw
Items.description: Slow-cooked dish that exudes a burst of rich, wild flavors. Eating it will make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

Items.name: Rushoar Bacon 'n' Eggs
Items.description: The smoky essence of bacon intertwines flawlessly with the gentle texture of eggs, creating a sublime harmony of flavors. Eating it will increase Attack by +10% for a period of time.

Items.name: Reindrix Stew
Items.description: Stewed vegetables and venison that was reared in a frigid environment. The meat's soft texture melts away to reveal a delicate sweetness. Eating it will stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

Items.name: Fried Chikipi
Items.description: Magnificently juicy poultry. Eating it will slightly increase work speed and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

Items.name: Rushoar Hot Dog
Items.description: Thick sausage wedged between warm buns. The crisply seared meat and spicy flavors are to die for. Eating it will increase Defense by +20% for a period of time.

Items.name: Eikthyrdeer Loco Moco
Items.description: Thick hamburger steak accented with a creamy fried egg. This sublime combination brings pure joy to the mouths of those who eat it. Eating it will increase Attack by +20% for a period of time.

Items.name: Eikthyrdeer Stew
Items.description: A tender, melt-in-your-mouth venison stew crafted with love. The intertwining flavors of vegetables and meat create a harmonious blend that brings out a comforting richness. Eating it will increase Defense by +20% for a period of time.

Items.name: Mozzarina Hamburger
Items.description: The rich flavor of beef melds with the sweetness of the buns in perfect harmony in this masterpiece. Eating it will increase work speed and make SAN decrease slightly slower for a period of time.

Items.name: Mozzarina Cheeseburger
Items.description: Now with cheese, this dish has reached the highest level of fine cuisine. Eating it will increase Attack by +20% and stay full longer for a period of time.

Items.name: Fried Kelpsea
Items.description: Crunchy fried batter perfectly accentuates the Kelpsea's plumpness. Eating it will increase Defense by +10% and make SAN decrease slower for a period of time.

Items.name: Dumud Chowder
Items.description: Dumud lavishly covered in a thick, creamy soup. Eating it will increase work speed and stay full slightly longer for a period of time.

Items.name: Cavern Mushroom
Items.description: Mushroom that grows prolifically in caves. Can be made into healing medicine.

Items.name: Mysterious Mushroom
Items.description: Mushrooms that are not suitable for eating raw. Eating makes one more prone to feeling hungry.

Items.name: Potato
Items.description: A hardy and filling crop that grows in any terrain. Not suitable for raw consumption.

Items.name: Carrot
Items.description: A vibrant, nutrient-rich root vegetable. Not suitable for raw consumption.

Items.name: Onion
Items.description: A cherished and easy-to-grow vegetable with a rich history. Not suitable for eating raw.

Items.name: Rushoar Gyoza
Items.description: A dish made by wrapping a filling of mushrooms and meat in wheat flour and boiling it. The chewy texture is irresistible. Eating it improves your Attack by 10% for a period of time.

Items.name: Stir-Fried Vegetables
Items.description: A dish made by stir-frying Carrot and Onion . A simple and delicious way to enjoy vegetables. Eating it will slightly increase your work speed and improve your Defense by 10% for a period of time.

Items.name: French Fries
Items.description: A dish made by deep-frying Potato . Once you start eating, you can't stop. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.

Items.name: Broncherry Fried Noodles
Items.description: A dish made by stir-frying noodles with vegetables and meat. The rich seasoning pairs perfectly with the thick cuts of meat. Eating it will increase your Attack by 20% for a period of time.

Items.name: Spring Rolls
Items.description: A dish made by wrapping vegetables and mushrooms in a thin skin and deep-frying them. The crispy texture is delightful. Eating it will make it harder for your SAN value to decrease and increase your Attack by 10% for a period of time.

Items.name: Gratin
Items.description: A dish made by coating potatoes with sauce and baking them to perfection. Best enjoyed hot and fresh. Eating it will provide lasting fullness and increase your Defense by 10% for a period of time.

Items.name: Minestrone
Items.description: A soup simmered with a variety of vegetables. Drinking it warms you to the core. Eating it will increase your work speed for a period of time.

Items.name: Mammorest Curry
Items.description: A dish made by simmering vegetables and meat with spices. The rich flavor is highlighted by large chunks of tender meat. Eating it will increase your Attack by 25% for a period of time.

Items.name: Galeclaw Nikujaga
Items.description: A dish made by simmering meat and potatoes in a sweet and savory sauce. It has a mysteriously nostalgic taste. Eating it will increase your Defense by 25% for a period of time.

Items.name: Mushroom Quiche
Items.description: A dish made by baking a pastry crust filled with eggs, vegetables, mushrooms, and cream. It’s delicious even when cooled. Eating it will help you stay fuller for a while and make it harder for your SAN value to decrease for a period of time.

Items.name: Gloopie Tentacle
Items.description: Gloopie tentacle. Known for its springy texture and light, refined flavor.

Items.name: Jelliette Bell Flesh
Items.description: Jelliette 's fleshy bell. Packed with ocean flavor and a delightfully chewy bite.

Items.name: Jellroy Bell Flesh
Items.description: Jellroy 's fleshy bell. Packed with ocean flavor and a delightfully plump texture.

Items.name: Munchill Meat
Items.description: Munchill meat. Has a satisfying chew that brings out layers of umami as you eat.

Items.name: Fried Gloopie Balls
Items.description: Gloopie Tentacle encased in a Flour dough and grilled into round bites. Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain for a period of time.

Items.name: Jelliette's Jiggly Jelly
Items.description: An unusual treat crafted from Jelliette Bell Flesh and Aquatic Pal Fluids . Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain and increase Attack by +10% for a period of time.

Items.name: Jellroy's Jolly Jelly
Items.description: An unusual treat crafted from Jellroy Bell Flesh and Red Berries . Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain and increase Defense by +10% for a period of time.

Items.name: Munchill Steak
Items.description: Charcoal-grilled to perfection, this steak offers a crispy exterior and melt-in-your-mouth juiciness. Unique compounds seal in flavor and enhance shelf life.

Items.name: Seafood Salad
Items.description: A healthy salad made with Gloopie Tentacle and Lettuce . Eating it will slightly increase EXP gain for a period of time.

Items.name: Caramel Cotton Candy
Items.description: Caramel cotton candy collected from Woolipop Terra . Its fluffy sweetness melts away in your mouth.

Items.name: Skutlass Sashimi
Items.description: Raw slices of Skutlass . Characterized by its supple, plump flesh. Caution is required when preparing it due to its sword-like spine.

Items.name: Salt-Grilled Skutlass
Items.description: Fresh fillets of Skutlass salted and grilled into a simple dish. When eaten, it nullifies knockback and flinching for a certain period of time.

Items.name: Seafood Pasta
Items.description: Fresh pasta is tossed with fragrant seafood in this exceptional dish, using Gloopie tentacles to elevate it even further. When eaten, it nullifies damage from explosions for a certain period of time.

Items.name: Mushroom Cake
Items.description: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. The talents of the resulting Pals will grow slightly more easily.

Items.name: Vegetable Cake
Items.description: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. Lay eggs twice at once.

Items.name: Extravagant Vegetable Cake
Items.description: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. Mutations are more likely to occur, and talents will grow more easily.

Items.name: Special Cake
Items.description: Place it in the chest at a Breeding Farm to make Pals lay a particularly healthy egg. More likely inherit multiple passive skills from their parents.

Items.description: Harness for Smokie Cryst . Activate its Partner Skill to detect the location of nearby Chromite .

Items.name: Marine Echobone
Items.description: A mysterious bone fragment. If you listen closely, a faint sound can be heard. A sound of gentle, rhythmic waves.

Items.name: Silent Echobone
Items.description: A mysterious bone fragment. If you listen closely, a faint sound can be heard. A sound of silence once encountered.

Items.name: Seafoam Echobone
Items.description: A mysterious bone fragment. If you listen closely, a faint sound can be heard. A sound of fleeting water bubbles popping.

Items.name: Tidewind Echobone
Items.description: A mysterious bone fragment. If you listen closely, a faint sound can be heard. The sound of a gentle sea breeze.

Items.name: Echoing Flute
Items.description: A bone flute recreated by deciphering a Faded Schematic. Its clear tone, echoing endlessly beyond the horizon, will likely call forth the oath-keeper, the Legendary Ocean King.

Items.name: Faded Schematic
Items.description: When in inventory, unlocks recipe for Echoing Flute . Can be crafted at Primitive Workbench .

Items.name: Normal Parachute
Items.description: A glider for soaring through the air. Cheaply made, it isn't very fast.

Items.name: Mega Glider
Items.description: A glider for soaring through the air. A mass produced commercial model, it’s decently fast.

Items.name: Giga Glider
Items.description: A glider for soaring through the air. With its capabilities improved, it can soar at high speeds.

Items.name: Hyper Glider
Items.description: A glider for soaring through the air. Its performance has been further improved, with increased speed and lift.

Items.name: Wing Pack
Items.description: A portable glider that enables flight. Consumes Wing Cell to propel the user through the skies.
